hooks.command: echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | grep -q 'git push' && (cd server && npm run test:unit -- --run) && (cd client && npm run test:unit -- --run) || true
echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | grep -q 'vercel --prod' && TAG=$(git tag --sort=-version:refname | head -1) && [ -n "$TAG" ] && gh release create $TAG --generate-notes || true
echo '\n--- MediCore Coverage Snapshot ---' && cd server && npm run test:coverage -- --silent 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || true
